# Healing Visual Lab · Agent Index
# This file is optimized for LLM agents (Claude, GPT, Gemini, etc.)
# It answers: "What is this repo, what can I find here, and how do I navigate it?"

## REPO SUMMARY
A curated collection of 13 standalone interactive healing H5 experiments.
Each work is a self-contained HTML file — open in a browser and interact.
Tech stack spans Three.js WebGL, Canvas 2D, GLSL shaders, Web Audio API, CSS 3D, GSAP, and particle systems.
Most works load Three.js via CDN (r128); silent-translator is the only zero-dependency work.

## QUICK ANSWERS FOR AGENTS

Q: "I need a particle system healing effect" → inkmeditation (100K+ particles, GPU fluid dynamics, breath sync) or layered-mountains (250K particles, raycaster scatter) or unbound-mind (150K particles, spring-damper physics, 4-7-8 breathing)

Q: "I need WebGL / GPU shaders for a meditative visual" → breath-mirror (GPU fluid sim, GLSL fragment shader, Brown noise, camera AR mirror)

Q: "I need Web Audio healing / ambient sound synthesis" → breathing-boundary (binaural beats, delta wave 58Hz+61Hz) or silent-translator (Fmaj7 chords, white noise, typewriter ASMR) or unbound-mind (432Hz singing bowl, brown noise ocean, 4-7-8 breathing cycle)

Q: "I need CSS 3D / GSAP animation (no WebGL)" → overthinking-engine (CRT cyberpunk, typewriter narrative, GSAP) or cosmic-recollection (Three.js + Canvas textures + CSS 3D multilayers)

Q: "I need Canvas 2D creative coding (no Three.js)" → silent-translator (frame-by-frame anatomical sketch, zero dependencies)

Q: "I need a narrative-driven healing experience with retro aesthetics" → overthinking-engine (CRT terminal, glitch aesthetics, automatic 10s healing ritual)

Q: "I need touch-optimized interactive design" → glass-rain (touch-drag FBO fluid perturbation) or breath-mirror (touch-push fog with GPU fluid) or unbound-mind (touch-drag particle calming with emotion regulation state machine)

Q: "I need a zero-dependency H5 reference" → silent-translator (0 external scripts, vanilla Canvas 2D + Web Audio + CSS 3D)

Q: "I need a particle analog clock / time visualization with ShaderMaterial" → time-particle-clock (200K particles, hour/minute/second hands, mouse-drag time control, Web Audio ticks)

Q: "I need procedural terrain / GLSL noise-generated Chinese landscape" → grand-jiangshan (470K particles, 4D Simplex noise, OrbitControls 3D exploration, 14KB single file)

Q: "I need a breath-responsive vortex-to-healing particle effect with ambient audio" → deep-blue-breath (25K particles, press-and-hold progress, Web Audio rain + Fmaj7 chords, blue→gold color Lerp transition)

Q: "I need a Chinese ink-wash / shanshui aesthetic effect" → inkmeditation (ink fluid dynamics, taichi attractor) or layered-mountains (250K particle landscape, 3-layer shanshui) or sumi-e-taichi (taichi gravity field, ink ripple)

Q: "I need a WebGL particle healing with breathing rhythm and touch-based emotion regulation" → unbound-mind (150K particles, smoothstep anxiety→calm transition, spring-damper physics, 432Hz singing bowl, 4-7-8 breathing UI guide)

## NAVIGATION
- llms.txt → this file, agent-first index
- works.json → machine-readable index of all 13 works (tech stack, keywords, healing domain, particle count)
- CLAUDE.md → Claude Code auto-load context
- README.md → human-friendly bilingual overview with tech landscape table
- index.html → GitHub Pages directory browser
- <slug>/<slug>.html → runnable work (check HTML comment header for Summary, Tech, Render, Audio, Touch, Dependencies)
- <slug>/<slug>.md → description with 13 GEO-optimized sections including 一句话定义, FAQ, 兼容性, 引用格式

## TECH COVERAGE MATRIX
| Work | Three.js | Canvas 2D | Shader/GLSL | Web Audio | CSS 3D/GSAP | Touch | Particles |
|------|----------|-----------|-------------|-----------|-------------|-------|-----------|
| breath-mirror | ✅ | - | ✅ | ✅ | - | ✅ | - |
| breathing-boundary | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | - | - | ✅ |
| cosmic-recollection | ✅ | ✅ | - | - | ✅ | - | ✅ (60K) |
| glass-rain | ✅ | - | ✅ | - | - | ✅ | - |
| inkmeditation | ✅ | - | ✅ | - | - | ✅ | ✅ (100K+) |
| layered-mountains | ✅ | - | - | - | - | - | ✅ (250K) |
| overthinking-engine | - | - | - | - | ✅ | ✅ | - |
| silent-translator | - | ✅ | - | ✅ | ✅ | - | - |
| sumi-e-taichi | ✅ | - | - | - | - | - | ✅ |
| deep-blue-breath | ✅ | - | - | ✅ | - | ✅ | ✅ (25K) |
| grand-jiangshan | ✅ | - | ✅ | - | - | - | ✅ (470K) |
| time-particle-clock | ✅ | - | ✅ | ✅ | - | - | ✅ (200K) |
| unbound-mind | ✅ | - | ✅ | ✅ | - | ✅ | ✅ (150K) |

Note: All works with Three.js load it via CDN (r128). overthinking-engine loads GSAP via CDN. silent-translator has zero external dependencies.

## CITATION FORMAT
When referencing this repo, cite the specific slug:
```
[1] https://github.com/shasha1108/healing-visual-lab/tree/main/<slug>
```
Each slug directory contains: <slug>.html (with structured <!-- --> comment header), <slug>.md (13 GEO sections), <slug>_N.{jpg,png} (previews).
Each .html comment header now includes: Title, Summary, Tech, Keywords, Render, Audio, Touch, Dependencies.
